summary: Read-only R7 review completed for DinoBrain unfinished improvement plan from task lifecycle, review queue, semantic job, and stale task settlement lenses. Reviewed Codex memory registry, completion/consensus docs, package scripts, lifecycle/review source, verifier wiring, and current state artifacts. Verdict prepared as REVISE_REQUIRED because task lifecycle conditions are concrete, but review worklist/action backlog and health/verify-goal parity need stronger final completion conditions.
decisions: Current task lifecycle/settlement blocker is real: current task_sessions.json reports needs_attention with 8 blockers, and task_lifecycle_settlement.json reports 8 unapplied finish-gate repairs.

Source and verifier wiring now hard-gates task_lifecycle_current and task_lifecycle_settlement_current in verify:goal, which is sufficient for stale task/finish-gate integrity once applied on the real vault.

Review queue/semantic settlement is classified, but current completion conditions allow classified manual backlog as health-green; that needs explicit acceptance criteria and verify-goal/health/Observatory parity for review worklist/actions so backlog cannot become hidden knowledge debt.
Global npm was unavailable in this shell, but fixture verifiers passed via the portable Node runtime at <machine-local-path> engine\.tools\node-v24.17.0-win-x64\node.exe.
next_steps: Revise completion conditions to add review:worklist and review:worklist:actions, or documented equivalents, to the required verifier registry and/or verify:goal blocker model.
Require completion evidence that all deterministic lifecycle settlement repairs are applied and that remaining recent active tasks are within the freshness window with owners/finish protocol visible.

Clarify that classified manual semantic review backlog is allowed only as visible pending debt that is excluded from default retrieval, bounded/clustered by worklist, and not counted as reviewed memory.
After revisions, rerun the ten-agent consensus protocol against the same document revision.

task lifecycle review queue semantic job settlement scripts source docs
